cases.expected: hard error — applicability gate not confirmed
cases.banner:
✗ DISCRETE-GROUP INPUT ERROR — RESULTS NOT SHOWN
Discrete-group applicability gate is not confirmed. This model assumes a rigid attachment (plate or HSS base) that delivers load through the group centroid with no group moment or torsion. Eccentric anchor groups are OUT OF SCOPE for this calculator — check the applicability box in Section 3 to proceed, or use continuous (plf) mode with a separate eccentricity analysis.
cases.notes: Guard fired: "DISCRETE-GROUP INPUT ERROR — RESULTS NOT SHOWN … check the applicability box". No result rows emitted.
